SEARCH

Uses of Package
sc.fiji.snt.annotation

Packages that use sc.fiji.snt.annotation
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt
SNT core classes
sc.fiji.snt.analysis
Analysis of Trees.
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.graph
Classes for handling neuronal reconstructions as graphs
sc.fiji.snt.annotation
Classes handling neuropil annotations and atlases metadata.
sc.fiji.snt.io
Classes for importing reconstructions into SNT.
sc.fiji.snt.seed
Classes for Seed Tracing.
sc.fiji.snt.util
Miscellaneous SNT utilities, including classes defining reconstruction nodes.
sc.fiji.snt.viewer
Visualization of reconstructions
sc.fiji.snt.viewer.geditor
Classes implementing SNT's Graph Viewer
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.annotation used by sc.fiji.snt
    Class
    Description
    BrainAnnotation
    Classes extending this interface implement a neuropil label/annotation aka "compartment".
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.annotation used by sc.fiji.snt.analysis

    Description
    AllenCompartment
    Defines an Allen Reference Atlas (ARA) [Allen Mouse Common Coordinate Framework] annotation.

    Classes extending this interface implement a neuropil label/annotation aka "compartment".
